title: Tuna's Basement Survival
description: This Modpack is a collection of mods that enhanced the multiplayer experience with a voice chat and many optimizations for the Tuna's Basement Minecraft server.
body: A lightweight modpack that keeps the true vanilla experience while greatly improving FPS, visuals, and multiplayer quality. Includes Distant Horizons, Shaders, Sound Physics, Litematica, MiniHUD and other optimization mods. Also features Plasmo Voice for proximity chat.
